definition: How a signature was captured: typed — a legal name entered via the keyboard, the accessible primary path always available; or drawn — a freehand mark on a canvas, an enhancement offered on top of (never instead of) the typed path. Recorded on the Signature Record so consumers know the capture modality.
usage: The signature-pad block keeps the typed path present even in drawn mode (the keyboard-first principle, mirroring data-transfer's file-picker primary path).
